name: Peter Thiel
background: Mr. Thiel is one of our co-founders and has served as the Chairman of our Board since 2003. He is a technology entrepreneur and investor, co-founding PayPal and serving as its CEO and Chairman. He was also the first outside investor in Facebook. Mr. Thiel holds a B.A. in Philosophy from Stanford University and a J.D. from Stanford Law School.

company_affiliations.name: Meta Platforms, Inc.
company_affiliations.title_or_role: Member of the Board of Directors
